testcase.name: test_fp5_fp6_setting_changed_handler_discipline
testcase.failure: FP-5 violation (TR-SET-001): res://src/gameplay/player/player_character.gd:1011 — _on_setting_changed first statement must be 'if category != &"<cat>": return'. Got: 'category: StringName, setting_name: StringName, value: Variant' res://src/core/signal_bus/event_logger.gd:292 — _on_setting_changed first statement must be 'if category != &"<cat>": return'. Got: 'print(_format_log_line(&"setting_changed", [category, name, value]))'
